name: Pan de Muerto
method: Place eggs, margarine, sugar, and salt in a mixer bowl.
Add the flour with the water. Then add yeast and mix to combine.
Add butter, orange zest, sugar, and orange essence. Mix to make a
Knead the dough, and transfer it back to the bowl. Cover it with
plastic wrap, and set aside for about 45 minutes.
Make pieces from the dough, and prepare greased baking sheets.
Place these pieces onto baking sheets. And press them slightly.
Mix a pinch of salt to the mixture of water and egg.
Transfer the buns/pieces to the oven. Bake until it is golden
Let it cool at room temperature.
When the Pan de Muerto bread is cooled, brush it with butter
